title: Crumbly Indian Crumble
description: A delicious dessert made with a crumbly topping and Indian spices. Perfect for a sweet treat.
instructions: 2. In a medium bowl, mix together the biscuit mix, melted butter, almonds, brown sugar, ginger, and cinnamon until well combined.
3. Pour the crumbly mixture into a 9x9-inch baking dish.
4. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
5. While the crumble is baking, prepare the berries by washing and patting them dry with a paper towel.
6. In a separate bowl, mix together the crumbly cheese mix and a pinch of sugar.
7. Remove the crumble from the oven and top with the berries and crumbly cheese mixture.
8. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the berries are tender.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
